jurisdictions.dataSource: ABCEats + NYC Open Data — DOHMH Restaurant Inspection Results (Socrata 43nn-pn8j)
jurisdictions.accessMethod: Open Data API / 批量抓取
jurisdictions.mainTargets: 咖啡馆、重点品牌、甲方门店
jurisdictions.stalenessNote: ABCEats is the public UI over this dataset; pull the dataset directly.

jurisdictions.dataSource: Bergen County DHS Consumer Health + NWBRHC + Municipality OPRA
jurisdictions.accessMethod: Local Health Dept / OPRA / 人工导入
jurisdictions.mainTargets: 咖啡馆、重点品牌、甲方NJ实体
jurisdictions.stalenessNote: No statewide/online DB (confirmed). OPRA request per municipality (~10 business days). NJ special handling: route by municipality; never record missing data as 'no inspection'.

jurisdictions.dataSource: Newark Health Inspection Lookup + Food & Drug Bureau
jurisdictions.accessMethod: 查询页 / 浏览器自动化 / 人工复核
jurisdictions.mainTargets: 咖啡馆、重点品牌、甲方门店
jurisdictions.stalenessNote: Online lookup backend is JS/CAPTCHA-gated and unverified — prefer manual/OPRA via the Food & Drug Bureau; do NOT bypass bot-detection.

jurisdictions.dataSource: LA County Dept. of Public Health, Environmental Health (ArcGIS Hub)
jurisdictions.mainTargets: 咖啡馆、饮品店、重点品牌
jurisdictions.stalenessNote: Use the County ArcGIS set (rolling 3yr). Do NOT use data.lacity.org/29fd-3paw — it is FROZEN at 2018.

jurisdictions.dataSource: SF DPH via DataSF (Socrata LIVES pyih-qa8i)
jurisdictions.accessMethod: 查询页 / 浏览器自动化 / 人工导出
jurisdictions.stalenessNote: SF LIVES feed (pyih-qa8i) confirmed frozen — last inspection 2019-11-28; no current per-establishment successor (ramz-vejd/6ud7-8ksb are aggregated views). Real 2019 café/brand rows seeded via intake/inspections.json (true dates, so staleness is visible); treat as historical until a live SF export is confirmed.

jurisdictions.dataSource: Analyze Boston (CKAN) Food Establishment Inspections + Mayor's Food Court
jurisdictions.mainTargets: 咖啡馆、重点品牌、甲方门店

jurisdictions.dataSource: Cambridge Open Data — Sanitary Inspections (Socrata ryb9-qzmw)
jurisdictions.accessMethod: Open Data API / 批量抓取
jurisdictions.stalenessNote: Use ryb9-qzmw — the widely-cited mh73-gjid id is dead/404.

jurisdictions.dataSource: DC Health Food Establishment Inspection Reports (HealthSpace)
jurisdictions.accessMethod: 查询页 / PDF / HTML 报告
jurisdictions.stalenessNote: No open dataset found — per-record HTML/PDF manual intake.

jurisdictions.dataSource: FDACS Food Permit Center — Food Establishment Inspection Reports
jurisdictions.accessMethod: 查询页 / 表单搜索 (manual / public-records)
jurisdictions.stalenessNote: fdacs.gov robots.txt is default-deny and disallows /search — do NOT scrape. Use the UI manually or a public-records request. (Restaurants proper are DBPR, out of scope.)

alertRules.conditionZh: 重点品牌/咖啡馆门店出现 关闭 / 停业 / Permit Suspension / Stop Sale / Imminent Health Hazard
alertRules.conditionEn: Priority-brand/café store Closed / out-of-business / Permit Suspension / Stop Sale / Imminent Health Hazard

alertRules.conditionZh: Fail / Closed / Permit Suspension / 紧急复查
alertRules.conditionEn: Fail / Closed / Permit Suspension / urgent re-inspection

alertRules.conditionZh: Stop Sale / Closure / Permit Suspension / Imminent Health Hazard
alertRules.conditionEn: Stop Sale / Closure / Permit Suspension / Imminent Health Hazard

alertRules.conditionZh: Unsatisfactory·Fail / embargo / condemnation / closure / permit suspension / foodborne illness investigation
alertRules.conditionEn: Unsatisfactory or Fail / embargo / condemnation / closure / permit suspension / foodborne illness investigation

alertRules.conditionZh: Unsatisfactory·Fail / multiple critical violations / 紧急复查 / 执法行动
alertRules.conditionEn: Unsatisfactory or Fail / multiple critical violations / urgent re-inspection / enforcement action

alertRules.conditionZh: 虫害 / 污水倒流 / 冷藏失控 / 热保温不足 / 生熟交叉污染 / 洗手设施不可用
alertRules.conditionEn: pest / sewage backflow / cold-holding failure / hot-holding failure / raw-cooked cross-contamination / handwashing unavailable

alertRules.conditionZh: 冰机 / 牛奶 / 饮品设备 / 冷藏温度 / 清洁消毒 / 虫害 反复出现
alertRules.conditionEn: ice machine / milk / beverage equipment / cold holding / cleaning-sanitizing / pest recurring

alertRules.conditionZh: 同品牌或同区域重复同类违规
alertRules.conditionEn: same brand or area repeating the same violation category

alertRules.conditionZh: 门店 / 竞品 / 供应链 被媒体报道形成负面舆情
alertRules.conditionEn: store / competitor / supply-chain negative media sentiment
